name: Amifa Co.,Ltd.
summary: Amifa Co., Ltd. manufactures and distributes various merchandises in Japan. Its products include gift wrapping products, including ribbons, gift wrap papers, paper boxes, paper bags, and film bags; stationery and DIY products comprising washi tapes, journals, memo pads, and sticky notes; and table wares, such as preserving flowers, flower pots, artificial flowers, and accessories. It services companies, such as confectionery manufacturers, Packaging Companies, Yen 100 shops' FC, super market stores, Flower Shops and stationary manufacturers. Amifa Co., Ltd. was founded in 1973 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
